title: reseda suffruticosa subsp. barrelieri
intro: Reseda suffruticosa subsp. barrelieri, also known as Barrelier's burnet, is a plant species in the family Resedaceae, characterized by its fragrant, yellowish-green foliage and white or yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Barrelier's burnet include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for minor cuts and scrapes. The plant is typically harvested in its fresh or dried form and can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
